rulings.Case Title: PATRICK O'SULLIVAN VS. ANDREA RUOTSI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Motion To Compel Discovery Adn Sanctions And To Vacate Same
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 26, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF PATRICK O'SULLIVAN'S Motion For Reconsideration of Order Granting Motion To Compel Discovery And Sanctions And To Vacate Same DENY - Fails to sustain burden, point and authorities lacking. Set forth no statutory basis for ruling of any sort and fails to submit competent evidence. Defendant's request for sanctions per CCP 128.5 is DENIED = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE, VS. JOSEPH ASTSUS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order To Dismiss Wihtout Prejudice
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 26, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT JOSEPH ATSUS'S Motion For Reconsideration Of Order To Dismiss Wihtout Prejudice Continued to March 7, 2013. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6b and provide courtesy copies of moving papers by February 28, 2013, 4PM. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MAXIMO MANAGEMENT, INC et al VS. HOMAYUN ZADEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 26, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF MAXIMO MANAGEMENT, INC AND PRC SERIES 1 LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANT subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATEL, MANGU D., D/B/A FRANCES HOTEL et al VS. JOE VILLA GOMEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 26, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANTS JOE VILLAGOMEZ AND MARITZA GARCIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENY - failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C. Copy of operative complaint which motion is based on. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HARRY C. THOMAS VS. BRIAN GREEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, February 26, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANTS BRIAN GREEN AND AMARYLLIS (AMY) GREEN'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENY - Complaint sufficient re standing and nuisance. DENY request for judicial notice. None filed. = (501/REQ)
